name: Safavid Iran (1665)
description: Seven horizontal stripes — red, blue, white, red, blue, white, and gold — a 1665 European depiction of the Safavid Persian flag.
history: A mid-17th-century (1665) European rendering of a Safavid Persian flag as a striped banner, of the kind recorded in contemporary Dutch and other European flag charts. It differs from the green Lion-and-Sun military banner also associated with the later Safavids.
